author: claude
content: Post-reshape correction: byte-identical gate faithfully reproduced the branch STALE state — branch was 1 commit behind master (missing #1186, FF150->151 bump merged 2026-06-15). The byte-identical reshape commit 2 actively reverted FF151->150 + dropped -remote-allow-system-access (pure stale-revert, zero stealth content). Corrected on scratch: restored the 3 FF files (install-firefox.sh, deploy_firefox.py, test_profile.py) to master in commit 2; descendants auto-rebased conflict-free. Result: stealth-reshaped@origin tip aad2b839, 5 commits, net diff vs master clean stealth-only (no FF revert), jj-precommit green. Tip == old branch tip + mandatory FF151 pickup. NOT force-pushed to #1154 — deviates from byte-identical gate, awaiting user go.
